---
name: Feature request
title: ''
description: Suggest a new capability for tournament or community operations
labels: enhancement
body:
  - type: textarea
    id: problem
    attributes:
      label: Problem to solve
      description: What tournament or community operations problem should be addressed?
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: workflow
    attributes:
      label: Suggested workflow
      description: Describe the workflow or experience you would like to see.
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: scenario
    attributes:
      label: Real-world usage scenario
      description: Describe how this would be used in practice.
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: roles
    attributes:
      label: Benefiting roles
      description: Who would benefit, such as organizers, staff, participants, or community admins?
  - type: textarea
    id: alternatives
    attributes:
      label: Alternatives considered
  - type: textarea
    id: context
    attributes:
      label: Additional context or mockups
